title: Network Statistics of the Whole-Brain Connectome of Drosophila
abstract: Comprehensive graph-theoretic analysis of the FlyWire whole-brain connectome of Drosophila. Characterizes network properties including degree distributions, clustering, modularity, rich-club organization, and information flow across the entire brain, revealing organizational principles of neural circuit architecture at whole-brain scale.
notes: New paper. Network-level analysis companion to the FlyWire flagship connectome paper.
